title: crassula perfoliata var. coccinea
intro: Crassula perfoliata var. coccinea, also known as the Red Lantern Plant, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Crassulaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Crassula perfoliata var. coccinea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
